query:
SELECT 
  u.id, u.name,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vocab_entries v WHERE v.userId = u.id) AS vocab_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pending_imports p WHERE p.userId = u.id) AS pending_total,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pending_imports p WHERE p.userId = u.id AND p.status = 'pending') AS pending_active,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pending_imports p WHERE p.userId = u.id AND p.status = 'accepted') AS pending_accepted
FROM users u
ORDER BY u.id;

  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pending_imports p WHERE p.userId = u.id AND p.status = 'pending') AS pending_active,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pending_imports p WHERE p.userId = u.id AND p.status = 'accepted') AS pending_accepted
FROM users u
